metadata.title: Amanda Walsh — founder of Astrology Hub · tend-your-flame · dance card & sovereign response | Coherence Network
metadata.description: A welcome to Amanda Walsh, M.S. — founder and CEO of Astrology Hub, host of the top-rated Astrology Hub Podcast (13M+ downloads). The Inspired Evolution transmission seeded the body's tend-your-flame practice, the dance-card teaching, the ground-harder principle, and the numbness-has-its-own-pain quote from Zach Bush.

hero.eyebrow: Astrology Hub · 13M+ downloads · tend the flame · sovereignty through self-care
hero.name: Amanda Walsh
hero.welcome_md:
Founder and CEO of [Astrology Hub](https://astrologyhub.com/) and host of the Astrology Hub Podcast — over 13 million downloads, conversations with the world's leading astrologers and thought leaders on the cosmic shifts of our time. M.S.-credentialled; author of the forthcoming memoir *Life by the Stars* about following cosmic breadcrumbs toward a soul-aligned life.

*The Inspired Evolution conversation with Amrit Sandhu (2026) is where *tend the flame*, *dance card and sovereign response*, *ground harder when the field quickens*, and *numbness has its own pain* (her quoting [Zach Bush](/people/zach-bush) ) each entered this body's vocabulary.*

facts.label: Role
facts.value_md: Founder & CEO, Astrology Hub. Host of the Astrology Hub Podcast (13M+ downloads).

facts.label: Forthcoming book

facts.label: Transmission digested by this body
facts.value_md: *Inspired Evolution* podcast with Amrit Sandhu, 2026 — navigating the global shift of 2026, the move from earth/water density into air/fire quickening, divorce as initiation, past-life healing from leadership wounds, sovereignty through answering one's own inner knowing.

note_from_body.body_md: Amanda's work is well-tended at astrologyhub.com. This page recognises the four teachings she carried into this body through one long conversation, each now living as a vision-kb concept.

articles.body_md:
The Inspired Evolution episode arrived through one cell's listening in 2026 and deposited four distinct teachings into the network's vocabulary. Each one has since become a vision-kb concept; each one started as a sentence Amanda spoke to Amrit Sandhu.

- **Tend the flame (Vesta posture).** Sovereignty becomes service through self-care — never lead, hold space. The campfire is the network's posture: tend your own warmth, and cells gather at their own discretion. Seeded as [lc-tend-your-flame](/vision/lc-tend-your-flame).
- **Dance card + sovereign response.** Certain energies are written into the moment we incarnated into; how we meet them is the only sovereignty. Both fate and free will real at the same scale. Releases resignation (*nothing I do matters*) AND false control (*if I plan hard enough, I shape the outcome*) without collapsing one into the other. Seeded as [lc-dance-card-and-sovereign-response](/vision/lc-dance-card-and-sovereign-response).
- **Ground harder when the field quickens.** Pace as signal toward grounding, not output. When the cosmic field accelerates, simple practices — feet on earth, walks without phone, hands in soil — become load-bearing. Seeded as [lc-ground-harder-when-field-quickens](/vision/lc-ground-harder-when-field-quickens).
- **Numbness has its own pain.** Her quoting [Zach Bush](/people/zach-bush) — and the user named that Bush was physically encountered in this body's field at an Emergence Conference. The phrase travelled through Amanda; the contact was direct.
articles.heading: Four teachings in one conversation

articles.body_md:
- [lc-tend-your-flame](/vision/lc-tend-your-flame) — sovereignty through self-care; the campfire posture.
- [lc-dance-card-and-sovereign-response](/vision/lc-dance-card-and-sovereign-response) — fate and free will at the same scale.
- [lc-ground-harder-when-field-quickens](/vision/lc-ground-harder-when-field-quickens) — pace as signal toward grounding.
- *Numbness has its own pain* (carrying [Zach Bush](/people/zach-bush) 's phrase) — pairs with the above as the felt ground beneath the grounding practice.
articles.heading: What Amanda Walsh has given the Coherence Network
